name: Jiangsu Yida Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangsu Yida Chemical Co., Ltd. provides ethylene glycol ether and propylene glycol ether products, and their derivatives. It also offers ethyl glyme, propyl glyme, braking fluid, and polyethylene glycol products, as well as polyether products. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Jiangyin, the People's Republic of China.
